title: umbraculum corniculatum
intro: Umbraculum corniculatum, also known as the shadowy creeping thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Umbraculum corniculatum include relief from digestive problems, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may be found in tea or tincture form, often used to calm digestive issues and soothe respiratory problems.
